steps.title: Substitute the monthly payment into the formula
steps.content:
The formula is $f(x) = 24x + 1000$ where $x$ is the monthly payment. We need to find $f(350)$:
$$f(350) = 24(350) + 1000$$

steps.title: Calculate the total cost
steps.content:
Compute the product: $24 \times 350 = 8400$. This is the cost of 24 months of payments at $350 per month.

Add the fixed leasing fee: $8400 + 1000 = 9400$.

That matches Choice C — \$9,400.
